seo.title: Kixlogic Workforce Intelligence Platform
seo.description: Kixlogic Workforce Intelligence Platform — practical, affordable workforce software for teams under 500. Kixlogic ATS for hiring and Kixlogic CMP for compensation intelligence.

greeting.headline: Hi there, welcome to Kixlogic
greeting.subheadline: Hiring and compensation intelligence for teams under 500

sections.title: Hire smarter. Your way.
sections.description: Kixlogic ATS is built for small and mid-sized businesses. Launch in 10 minutes — AI resume scoring, analytics, white-label careers pages, and more.

cards.title: Built for teams under 500
cards.description: Not enterprise software with a small-business skin. Designed from scratch for practical hiring and HR teams.

cards.title: ATS + CMP in one platform
cards.description: Hire the right people and pay them fairly — without juggling separate recruiting and compensation tools.

cards.title: Live in minutes
cards.description: 100% cloud SaaS. Sign up, brand your careers page, and start hiring the same day. No IT project required.

sections.title: Compensation intelligence from market rates to payday.
sections.description: Market benchmarks, merit cycles, pay equity, and commission tracking — one platform for hiring, budgeting, and showing every dollar earned.

cards.title: Kixlogic ATS
cards.description: AI resume scoring, white-label careers pages, and advanced analytics — without the enterprise price tag.

cards.title: Kixlogic CMP
cards.description: Compensation intelligence with blended market rates, pay equity analysis, and merit cycle planning.

cards.title: Plans & pricing
cards.description: Four plans from $49/month. Growth and Professional include a 14-day free trial.

cards.title: Talk to our team
cards.description: Questions about setup, demos, or partnerships? We respond within one business day.

sections.title: Pipeline management built for real hiring teams
sections.description: Drag-and-drop kanban, AI scoring, interview scheduling, offer letters, and 90+ customizable application questions — all in one cloud platform.

sections.title: Pay decisions backed by real market data
sections.description: Benchmark roles by title, location, and experience. Model merit increases, spot pay equity gaps, and give managers confidence at offer time.

cards.title: AI resume scoring
cards.description: Every applicant gets an instant match score against your job requirements — stars, percentage, and missing skills in seconds.

cards.title: AI job descriptions
cards.description: Type a job title, pick your industry, and get a complete professional posting ready to edit and publish.

cards.title: Compensation intelligence
cards.description: Kixlogic CMP blends job postings, career sites, and BLS data into actionable pay benchmarks. Coming soon.
